category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Jordan (JSMO) technical regulation, energy labelling, and conformity certificate requirements.

title.en: China-to-Jordan Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入约旦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入約旦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Jordan's JSMO mandatory technical regulation, conformity certificate, energy-efficiency labelling/MEPS, JS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety requirements, R-600a refrigerant handling, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与约旦JSMO强制技术法规、符合性证书、能效标识/MEPS、JS/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求、R-600a制冷剂处理及当地进口商义务差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與約旦JSMO強制技術法規、符合性證書、能效標識/MEPS、JS/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求、R-600a製冷劑處理及當地進口商義務差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Jordanian technical regulations, JSMO conformity requirements, JS standards, MEPS/energy-label thresholds, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行约旦技术法规、JSMO符合性要求、JS标准、MEPS/能效标签门槛值及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行約旦技術法規、JSMO符合性要求、JS標準、MEPS/能效標籤門檻值及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Jordan (JSMO) compliance gaps: (1) a JSMO conformity certificate (Certificate of Conformity) issued against Jordanian technical regulation is required for customs clearance at Aqaba — Chinese CCC certification is not directly accepted; (2) electrical safety must be demonstrated to JS standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24, with appliances rated for Jordan's 230 V / 50 Hz grid (the 50 Hz frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V); (3) a Jordanian energy-efficiency label and minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) apply — Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades do not transfer; and (4) an in-country importer of record established in Jordan is required to clear and place the product. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge documentation against the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements must be verified. Jordan does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大约旦（JSMO）合规差距：（1）须取得依据约旦技术法规签发的JSMO符合性证书（Certificate of Conformity）方可在亚喀巴口岸通关——中国CCC认证不被直接接受；（2）电气安全须依据采纳IEC 60335-2-24的JS标准证明，且器具须适配约旦230 V / 50 Hz电网（50 Hz频率与中国相同，但额定电压不同于中国的220/380 V）；（3）约旦能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）适用——中国GB 12021.2能效等级不可转移；（4）须有在约旦设立的当地进口商作为进口记录方负责通关并投放产品。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合所采纳IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂要求。约旦不实行类似欧盟的横向RoHS/电池/户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大約旦（JSMO）合規差距：（1）須取得依據約旦技術法規簽發的JSMO符合性證書（Certificate of Conformity）方可在亞喀巴口岸通關——中國CCC認證不被直接接受；（2）電氣安全須依據採納IEC 60335-2-24的JS標準證明，且器具須適配約旦230 V / 50 Hz電網（50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但額定電壓不同於中國的220/380 V）；（3）約旦能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）適用——中國GB 12021.2能效等級不可轉移；（4）須有在約旦設立的當地進口商作為進口記錄方負責通關並投放產品。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合所採納IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑要求。約旦不實行類似歐盟的橫向RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (JSMO), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
